---
title: "KODAQS Team"
authors:
  - name: "Ladislav"
  - name: "David"
  - name: "Josefine"
  - name: "Lukas"
  - name: "Erik"
  - name: "Elnari"
  - name: "Soyeon"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contents"
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    theme: cosmo
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 7
    fig-dpi: 300
    number-sections: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: true
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

# Introduction
